name: workflow state contract architect_session decisions array carries id decision_point options_presented selected fields
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","architect_session":{"decisions":[{"id":"d1","decision_point":"auth","options_presented":["a","b"],"selected":"a","rationale":"x","adr_path":"docs/adr/0001-a.md"}]}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check architect-session 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decisions_count=1' out.txt && grep -q 'all_decisions_valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
